name: closeproof
description: Review a synthetic month-end close through source evidence, deterministic controls, bounded GPT-5.6 advice, and human disposition.

interface.longDescription: CloseProof guides controllers through a bundled synthetic close pack, deterministic controls, optional citation-bound GPT-5.6 advice, and an evidence-bound human decision. It writes only ignored local demo artifacts and never writes to an ERP.
defaultPrompt: Review the bundled June close with CloseProof
Explain the prepaid service-period exception with sources
